theme: Báo cáo tiến độ với sếp

vocab.example: Can you show me the progress of the payment module?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn cho tôi xem tiến độ của module thanh toán được không?

vocab.example: We reached an important milestone yesterday — the API is finally live.
vocab.example_vi: Hôm qua chúng tôi đạt một cột mốc quan trọng — API đã lên live.

vocab.example: The report feature is a bit behind schedule.
vocab.example_vi: Tính năng báo cáo đang hơi chậm tiến độ.

vocab.example: There is a small risk that we miss the deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Có một rủi ro nhỏ là chúng ta sẽ trễ hạn.

vocab.example: We need one more resource to finish this on time.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi cần thêm một nguồn lực nữa để hoàn thành đúng hạn.

vocab.example: I'm confident we can deliver this by Friday.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi tự tin chúng ta có thể giao việc này trước thứ Sáu.

vocab.meaning_vi: báo cáo cấp trên khi có vấn đề nghiêm trọng
vocab.example: If the issue continues, I will escalate it to the manager.
vocab.example_vi: Nếu vấn đề vẫn tiếp diễn, tôi sẽ báo cáo lên quản lý.

vocab.example: Let me give you a short summary of this week's work.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi tóm tắt ngắn gọn công việc tuần này.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Nam, do you have a minute? I want to hear about the project progress.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: Sure. Let me give you a short summary of this week's work.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: We reached an important milestone — the payment API is now live.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: That's great news. What about the report feature?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: It's a bit behind schedule. We are two days late.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: What is the risk if it stays behind schedule?

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: The risk is small, but we may need one more resource to catch up.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Okay, I can ask another team to help for two days.

lines.speaker: Nam (team lead)
lines.text: That would be great. I'm confident we can finish by next Monday then.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Good. Please escalate to me directly if anything blocks you.

questions.q: What milestone did the team reach?
options: The payment API is now live

questions.q: Why is the report feature behind schedule?
options: The team is two days late

questions.q: What does Hoa offer to help with?
options: Asking another team to help for two days
Extending the deadline by a week

shadowing: Let me give you a short summary of this week's work first.
We reached an important milestone this week with the payment API.
The report feature is a bit behind schedule, about two days late.
We may need one more resource from another team to catch up.
Please escalate to me directly if anything blocks you this week.
